name: Set up a code graph
description: Build a graphify code knowledge graph for the current repo.
rules: Add `graphify-out/` to .gitignore — it's a build artifact, not source.
Rebuild the graph after large refactors so symbol recall stays accurate.
steps: Ensure graphify is installed (`pipx install graphifyy`).
From the repo root, run `graphify update .`.
In Lectern, open Brain -> Code graph and click Build/Rebuild to index it.
author: lectern
